patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Simulor
Synoid Simulor

patchlogs.name: Nora's Mix Volume 1: Hotfix 31.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Simulor missing its Critical Chance/Damage and Status Chance stats in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Hotfix 27.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Returned Simulor vortex lifetime to 5 second duration in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes:
We have made the following changes to the Simulor/Synoid Simulor:
Simulor: 20 to 50 
Synoid Simulor: 20 to 80
Simulor: 75 to 100
Synoid Simulor: 75 to 240 
Once 3 fully maxed vortexes are active, the Simulor will now default to single-shot orbs 
with the reduced lifetime of a single orb, there are now more ways to use the Simulor against enemies!
Updated Simulor and Synoid Simulor’s FX!

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.2
patchlogs.changes:
Simulor: 60%
Synoid Simulor: 60%

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Simulor
Synoid Simulor

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Update 27
patchlogs.changes:
Simulor: 1.1->1.2
Synoid Simulor: 1.1->1.15

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Simulor Energy color persisting as default.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixes towards Multishot Mods potentially not working with the Simulor.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.9 + 24.2.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Client Simulors continuously animating and playing shooting FX for Host and other Clients.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.changes: Tweaks to Staticor and Simulor FX to try and reduce blowout with brightest Energy colours and Mirage equipped.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Cephalon Simaris’ Simulor Blueprint Offering displaying a misleading ‘RANK 30’ description.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed non-positional Simulor firing sounds.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Mesa Prime - Hotfix 24.2.2
patchlogs.changes: Improved the Staticor and Simulor FX.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Simulor's Critical Chance displaying 2% instead of 12% in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.8
patchlogs.changes:
Simulor now correctly displays 2% Critical Chance and 30% Status Chance in the Arsenal.
Synoid Simulor now correctly displays 5% Critical Chance and 35% Status Chance in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Simulor Orbs not stacking at all.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.additions: To improve performance, added a small delay between each explosion when activating the alt-fire on certain weapons (e.g. Simulor, Penta).
patchlogs.changes:
It will have its Alt-Fire stack similar to the Simulor to make a large Infested Orb that you can shoot through for additional stats.
The Simulor's entry into Arsenals marked one of the more unique moments in Weapon history. It's always been a little weird 
The Simulor has had its max Ammo Capacity reduced to 60.
Considering the Simulor was the only Primary Cephalon weapon, it was easy to see a Synoid version entering Arsenals. Like its vanilla counterpart, it's always been a little weird 
The Synoid Simulor has had its max Ammo Capacity reduced to 75.

patchlogs.name: The Pacifism Defect: Hotfix 19.12.2
patchlogs.changes: Improved performance of the Simulor.

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Simulor Vortexes will turn invisible when fully stacked and last forever when playing on a Dedicated Server as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/752128-simulor-synoid-bugged/#comment-8322988

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.5.4
patchlogs.changes: Reduced volume and cleaned up audio of Synoid Simulor when being used by other players.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4.2 + 19.4.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Simulor

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Hotfix 19.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed memory/object leak with Vauban's Vortex and Simulor.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #2
patchlogs.changes: Excluded Reactant and Index Point pickups from Simulor, Inaros' Sandstorm, Zephyr Tornado, and Vauban's Vortex. This also fixes the exception lists for the Simulor; it wasn't supposed to be moving  gameplay objects (eg Datamass, Excavation Power Cells, Raptor Cells, etc) but it generally wasn't of a problem because the objects were heavy enough (properly excluding them should run faster too!). As more and more gameplay components rely on pickups, we've addressed this issue as it is commonly discussed by you all.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Client’s seeing disappearing Simulor orbs.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.8.0
patchlogs.changes: •    Tweaked the Stug and Simulor projectiles to properly appear stacked instead of hovering over each other. This also improves the projectiles landing position on objects.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Simulor not properly applying multi-shot upgrades when used by a Client.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased the AoE of the Simulor series in Conclave.
Removed the Headshot damage multiplier from the Simulor series in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Limbo being able to attack enemies with the Simulor while within the Rift.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.6
patchlogs.changes: Simulor series AoE radius and damage increased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.4 + 18.4.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Tweaked Audio on the Simulor.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the Simulor’s screen shake effect.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Synoid Simulor not properly creating a vortex when used with Hall of Mirrors as a Client as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/524634-simulorsynoid-simulor-and-mirage-clones/

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Simulor creating too many explosions when used with Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors and fire rate Mods.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.4.2
patchlogs.changes: Slightly altered the Simulor’s reload sounds to prevent audio overlap when firing.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Slightly adjusted the visual FX on the Synoid Simulor’s vortexes.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Cephalon Suda: Synoid Simulor 
Cephalon Suda’s custom issue Simulor was built to satisfy her curiosity.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted audio FX on the Simulor’s shots.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Simulor orbs not properly combining with each other when you are at max range.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.10.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Information on the Simulor’s radial damage per-projectile stack has been added to the Arsenal.
Fixed crashes related to the Simulor.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.10.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Simulor Gravitational Singularity Generator available now!
Send the enemy into oblivion! The Simulor Gravitational Singularity Generator produces miniature Gravitational Singularities that can be used for scientific study or self-defense.
Add the Simulor to your Arsenal by visiting the Market or obtain the blueprint from Cephalon Simaris’ Sanctuary today!
